search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk CG183 structured drug allergy documentation record share
site:nice.org.uk NG5 medication communication allergy status reconciliation
candidate_sources_rejected: food or environmental allergies mapped from drug-allergy recommendations
allergy status changed without clinician confirmation
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: A list update requires clinician verification.
No treatment or patient instruction is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: No legacy item in gp-allergy-list-update remains source-supported after conservative correction; item-specific population applicability was not independently established without new research.
setting_applicability: No legacy item in gp-allergy-list-update remains source-supported after conservative correction; transfer from the recorded source setting to the exact workflow item was not independently established.
UAE_applicability: insufficient_evidence for every removed gp-allergy-list-update legacy-item mapping; UAE applicability requires independent item-level review before any mapping is reinstated.
recency_verification: Exact official documents and sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The cited exact source remains current on the issuing organisation website at the review date.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact structured-documentation section supports recording a suspected or confirmed drug name, reaction signs and symptoms, severity, date, timing, indication, doses before onset, route, status, and specialist results without confirming allergy.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports structured recording of drug name, reaction signs, symptoms, severity, date and time, indication, number of doses or days before onset, route, status, and specialist-investigation results already available.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact medicines-communication section supports clinician-entered reconciliation, communication, patient questions, safety-net, and follow-up documentation without changing the allergy list automatically.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports complete and accurate medicine information, prescribed and non-prescribed medicines, allergies, timing, monitoring, and discussion at care transitions.

unresolved_source_gaps: Specific substance, reaction, date, severity, route, confirmation status, specialist result, non-drug allergy, list action, and communication remain unsupported unless entered.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.

All previously supported GP legacy-item mappings were conservatively removed because exact item identity, direct support, and item-specific applicability were not independently established under the fail-closed contract.
